sql_array: CREATE TABLE web_content (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url VARCHAR(255), content TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO web_content (id, url, content) VALUES (1, 'www.foo.com/help/', '<html>Help Page</html>');
INSERT INTO web_content (id, url, content) VALUES (2, 'www.foo.com', '<html>Main Page</html>');
CREATE TABLE export_logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, source_url VARCHAR(255), destination_url VARCHAR(255), export_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT url, DAV_EXP(url, '/help/', 'sites/www_foo_com', 'http://www.mydrive.com:8990/DAV/sites/') AS exported FROM web_content WHERE sameTerm(url, 'www.foo.com/help/');

WITH RECURSIVE export_failed AS (SELECT log_id, source_url, destination_url FROM export_logs WHERE source_url IS NULL) SELECT ef.log_id, ef.source_url, COALESCE(DAV_EXP(ef.source_url, '/help/', 'sites/www_foo_com', 'http://www.mydrive.com:8990/DAV/sites/'), 'Export Failed') AS result FROM export_failed ef;
SELECT DISTINCT ec.url FROM (SELECT url, count(*) OVER () AS total FROM web_content GROUP BY url HAVING total > 1) ec WHERE sameTerm(ec.url, 'www.foo.com/help/');
CREATE TABLE temp_export (temp_id INT, html_content BLOB);
INSERT INTO temp_export (temp_id, html_content) SELECT 1, DAV_EXP(url, '/help/', 'temp_sites-www_foo_com', 'http://www.mydrive.com:8990/DAV/temp/1') FROM web_content WHERE content IS NOT NULL;

SELECT CONCAT('Exported: ', content, ', Status: ', DAV_EXP(url, '/help/', 'temp_sites-www_foo_com', 'http://www.mydrive.com:8990/DAV/temp/1')) AS final_status FROM web_content WHERE sameTerm(url, 'www.foo.com');
ALTER TABLE web_content ADD COLUMN status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL;

UPDATE web_content SET status = 'exported' WHERE status IS NULL AND sameTerm(url, 'www.foo.com/help/') AND DAV_EXP(url, '/help/', 'sites/www_foo_com', 'http://www.mydrive.com:8990/DAV/sites/') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_exports FROM export_logs WHERE sameTerm(destination_url, 'http://www.mydrive.com:8990/DAV/sites/') AND export_time IS NULL;
